name: Discord Bot Tools
description: Core Discord moderation and server management functions. Use these when the bot needs to take action in a server based on user requests or automated triggers.
example_prompts: Mute user #12345 for 10 minutes for spamming
Create a role called 'VIP' with blue color
Send an announcement to #general about server maintenance tonight

functions.name: mute_member
functions.description: Temporarily mute a Discord server member so they cannot send messages. Use when a user is spamming, being disruptive, or violating rules.

user_id.description: Discord user ID (snowflake) of the member to mute

duration_minutes.description: How long to mute the user in minutes (1-40320)

reason.description: Reason for the mute (shown in audit log and user DM)

notify_user.description: Whether to DM the user explaining the mute

functions.name: kick_member
functions.description: Kick a member from the Discord server. They can rejoin with a new invite. Use for moderate violations.

user_id.description: Discord user ID of the member to kick

functions.name: send_channel_message
functions.description: Send a message to a specific Discord channel. Use for announcements, responses, or automated notifications.

channel_id.description: Discord channel ID to send the message to

embed_title.description: Optional embed title for rich formatting

embed_color.description: Optional embed color as hex integer (e.g. 0x5865F2 for blurple)

functions.name: create_role
functions.description: Create a new role in the Discord server with specified permissions and appearance.

color.description: Role color as hex integer (e.g. 0xFF0000 for red)

hoist.description: Whether to display this role separately in the member list
